name: OpenWiki Docs Daily Update
prompt: Run /openwiki-docs:update. If OpenWiki documentation changed, create a branch named openwiki/update, commit only openwiki/** plus top-level AGENTS.md or CLAUDE.md changes, and open a pull request titled "docs: update OpenWiki" with a concise summary and review notes. If no docs changes are needed, do not create a commit or PR.
